feed.title: Vaibhav Soni — Notes from the trenches

entry.title: Deploying AI PoCs: what an infra engineer actually owns
entry.summary: Scope contract for deploying AI proof-of-concepts when you don't own the model. Jenkins, Sonar gates, Nginx, TLS, and where the line is.

entry.title: Building Production-Grade Kubernetes Clusters on DigitalOcean
entry.summary: Step-by-step guide to deploying a highly available Kubernetes cluster with Apache Kafka and ZooKeeper on DigitalOcean.

entry.title: Pinning Asterisk: when docker commit beats a Dockerfile
entry.summary: Client needed an exact-version Asterisk calling server. The clean Dockerfile path lost — runtime state forced a different approach.
